metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by Raphjay2406

plugins.name: gen
plugins.description: Genorah v4.2.0 — Visual Selection. Deterministic companion renderer turns screen-specs into color-accurate clickable HTML cards with real DNA hex swatches, real fonts, colored mockups, and WCAG contrast badges. Four surfaces: creative directions, iterate proposals, archetype pick, palette/DNA. Per-option hero images via gpt-image with DNA-gradient fallback. Selection round-trip: clicks recorded to .events, read-selection.mjs resolves pick for next turn. 108-agent A2A-protocol pipeline (10 directors + 98 workers), 42 archetypes, 394-pt two-axis quality gate, 10 MCP integrations. From discovery to ship in measurably enforced quality.

plugins.name: wavy-bavy
plugins.description: Integrate the wavy-bavy library for seamless wave transitions between page sections
